quality.rationale: 基于闵氏度规内积结构的纯几何证明题，需理解零矢量正交性导致的退化度量空间性质，逻辑链条完整且可直接迁移至任意洛伦兹流形

origin.question: Problem 3.2. Find 4 linearly independent null vectors in Minkowski space. Can you find 4 which are orthogonal?## Solution
origin.solution: Solution 3.2. Four linearly independent null vectors are e.g.$$\mathbf {e}_{z} + \mathbf {e}_{t}, \mathbf {e}_{z} - \mathbf {e}_{t}, \mathbf {e}_{x} + \mathbf {e}_{t}, \mathbf {e}_{y} + \mathbf {e}_{t}.$$Suppose there existed 4 null vectors A, B, C, D which were mutually orthogonal. Linear independence implies that any vector can be written$$\mathbf {V} = \mathbf {a A} + \mathbf {b B} + \mathbf {c C} + \mathbf {d D}$$but the length of this vector is clearly zero if $\mathbf{A}$ , $\mathbf{B}$ , $\mathbf{C}$ , $\mathbf{D}$ are null and mutually orthogonal. Hence 4 such vectors cannot exist.
